opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I am freezing and shaking uncontrollably, I have a deep ache under my ribs on the right, and my spouse says my eyes have gone yellow.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The shaking and high fever came on suddenly a few hours ago and I feel really awful — the paracetamol I took did nothing.

symptom_narrative.onset: the fever and violent shivering started suddenly about 3 hours ago
symptom_narrative.duration: about 3 hours for the fever and shaking; the tiredness and yellowing have been building over the past month
symptom_narrative.character: uncontrollable teeth-chattering shivering with a burning fever, and a deep dull ache high up under the right ribs
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the shivering is the worst I've ever had and I feel completely wiped out and toxic
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: high up on the right side under the ribs; the ache sits there
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the fever and rigors are constant since they started a few hours ago
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — paracetamol two hours ago didn't touch the fever
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: my eyes and skin look yellow, I've been itchy all over on and off, very tired for weeks, I've lost weight without trying, and my stools have been pale and greasy and hard to flush
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I had a similar but milder attack of fevers and right-sided pain about 6 months ago
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck in bed, shivering too much to walk without help

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: took some about 2 hours ago for the fever

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with spouse who is present and made the call; deteriorating quickly and needing help to move

objective_data_offered.value: the whites of the eyes and the skin look yellow on camera; the patient is visibly shivering and looks flushed and sweaty
spouse says his eyes have turned yellow, he is shaking uncontrollably, drenched in sweat and can't get out of bed
an emesis basin is at the bedside
